title: Zero Vector — Interview
description: Captures a user interview session: who was interviewed, what they said, and what patterns emerged.

participant.description: Name or anonymous identifier of the interviewee

role.description: The participant's role or relationship to the product

key_quotes.description: Notable direct quotes from the participant

jobs_observed.description: Jobs to be done observed or mentioned during the interview

pain_points.description: Frustrations, blockers, or unmet needs expressed by the participant

synthesis.description: Brief summary of key findings from this interview
